gigapan.description:
Every time we look more closely we find the unexpected.  It could be water erosion on Mars, traditional foods offered in a market catering to people we think of as the 'enemy,' 
and then we can start looking more closely.

"There is plenty of room at the bottem," said a guileless Feynman.  And as the poem goes
"Big fleas have little fleas,
Upon their backs to bite 'em,
And little fleas have lesser fleas,
and so, ad infinitum."

As for me, I am discovering a deep desire for this work.
